prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a young South Asian woman in a dramatic black-and-red romantic film-noir scene. She has long wavy dark brown hair with a center part, soft natural makeup, expressive brown eyes, and a calm slight smile while looking toward a man in the foreground. Dress her in a shimmering white stone-work saree with a black sleeveless blouse and ornate silver oxidized jewelry: exactly 4 visible jewelry elements, including two dangling jhumka earrings, one layered choker necklace with a dark central stone, and stacked silver bangles on one wrist. Place the man only as a dark out-of-focus silhouette on the right foreground, back to camera, holding her hand near the lower center; his face should not be visible. Use high-contrast low-key lighting with a strong red rim light outlining her hair and shoulder, soft warm key light on her face, deep black shadows, a smoky dark background with subtle red bokeh, dreamy 1990s Bollywood film mood, shallow depth of field, soft glow, realistic skin texture, subtle film grain, vertical 3:4 composition, intimate close framing from waist/chest up, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a young South Asian woman in a dramatic black-and-red romantic film-noir scene. She has long wavy dark brown hair with a center part, soft natural makeup, expressive brown eyes, and a calm slight smile while looking toward a man in the foreground. Dress her in a shimmering white stone-work saree with a black sleeveless blouse and ornate silver oxidized jewelry: exactly 4 visible jewelry elements, including two dangling jhumka earrings, one layered choker necklace with a dark central stone, and stacked silver bangles on one wrist. Place the man only as a dark out-of-focus silhouette on the right foreground, back to camera, holding her hand near the lower center; his face should not be visible. Use high-contrast low-key lighting with a strong red rim light outlining her hair and shoulder, soft warm key light on her face, deep black shadows, a smoky dark background with subtle red bokeh, dreamy 1990s Bollywood film mood, shallow depth of field, soft glow, realistic skin texture, subtle film grain, vertical 3:4 composition, intimate close framing from waist/chest up, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感竖构图肖像，主角是 一位年轻的南亚女性，采用忧郁的黑红 90 年代黑色电影风格。她留着 中分长波浪深棕色卷发，拥有富有表现力的棕色眼睛、柔和的自然妆容，神情平静而浪漫，微微抬头看向前景中的一名男性。她身穿 带有精致闪亮刺绣的白色宝石装饰纱丽，搭配无袖黑色上衣、银色氧化耳环、带有深色中心宝石的叠层银色颈圈、手镯和戒指。构图采用亲密的特写镜头：女性位于画面中心且光线明亮，而右侧前景中仅出现男性的深色失焦剪影，他的双手在画面下方中心位置轻轻握住她的手。使用高对比度的低调照明，背景为深黑色，头发和肩膀处有强烈的红色轮廓光，面部有柔和的暖色主光，带有轻微的雾气、梦幻般的电影质感、浅景深、逼真的皮肤纹理和细腻的胶片颗粒感。色调以黑色、奶油白、银色和饱和的深红色为主。无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无现代道具。
